title: Nami Wakes in Kureha’s Castle
description: On pages 2–5, nami wakes in kureha’s castle as nami recovers under Dr. Kureha’s care as Luffy becomes fascinated by Chopper and immediately tries to recruit him.
scene: Nami Wakes in Kureha’s Castle. Nami recovers under Dr. Kureha’s care as Luffy becomes fascinated by Chopper and immediately tries to recruit him. The focus is the story beat, character decisions, and dialogue driving this part.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Is it just me or is my face swollen a bit...?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Well watch your damn mouth, Luffy!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I'm still in my young and hip 130s!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: You want me to be a pirate? Don't be ridiculous!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: what a waste of my youth. I've got no interest in the seas at all.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Just come adventuring with us, Granny!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Didn't I just tell you to watch your mouth!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Hey, stop right there, you brats!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I'll be back in a jiffy with a delicious Reindeer Steak!()

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Not if I can help it! I'll skin and eat you annoying brats alive!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Aghhh! It's that old HAG again!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I'd rather have some peace and quiet than Reindeer meat...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I better go shut the door.

summary: This part centers on nami wakes in kureha’s castle, clarifying the immediate conflict and how it moves the chapter toward its next major turn.
